# Trygve Studio

> ISO 9001:2015 certified architecture, interior design & turnkey construction firm in Lucknow, India. Founded by Ar. Abdul Moid — delivering 200+ luxury residential and commercial projects across Uttar Pradesh.

## About
Trygve Studio Private Limited is a multidisciplinary design practice specializing in architecture, interior design, turnkey construction, and 3D visualization. We serve homeowners, developers, and businesses seeking premium design-build solutions in Lucknow, Patna, and across India.

## Services
- Residential Architecture (villas, apartments, bungalows) → https://trygvestudio.com/services/architects-in-lucknow
- Commercial Architecture (hotels, cafes, offices) → https://trygvestudio.com/services/architecture-firms-lucknow
- Interior Design → https://trygvestudio.com/services
- Luxury Architecture → https://trygvestudio.com/services/luxury-architecture-design-lucknow
- Turnkey Construction → https://trygvestudio.com/services/turnkey-construction-companies-lucknow
- 3D Walkthrough & Visualization → https://trygvestudio.com/services/3d-walkthrough-company-lucknow
- BIM Outsourcing → https://trygvestudio.com/services/bim-outsourcing-services

## Tools
- Construction Cost Calculator (free, instant estimates for Lucknow) → https://trygvestudio.com/price-calculator

## Locations
- Lucknow (headquarters): Gomti Nagar, Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh
- Also serving: Sushant Golf City, Ansal API, Kursi Road, and all Lucknow areas
- Interior Design services available in 20+ cities across India

## Key Facts
- 200+ luxury projects delivered
- ISO 9001:2015 certified
- Offices in Lucknow & Patna
- Team of 25+ architects, designers, and engineers
- Average project delivery: on-time track record
